title: Cycle 2: model comparison walk-forward
description: Compare FNO_small, FNO_large, LSTM, Transformer on 4 walk-forward OOS windows. FNO_large (8 modes, 32 width, 3 layers) is the new best model: positive in 4/4 windows.
headline: FNO_large is positive in 4/4 walk-forward windows (0.255, 0.360, 0.290, 0.306) with median 0.30. This is a much more robust result than FNO_small (which was -0.251 in 2015-2019). The larger architecture generalizes across regimes including the calm pre-COVID period.
